full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #101 (2026-07-23)

PULSE
Health: 0.6438 (B). 1060 wallets, 319 contributors. 14 memos today vs 17 avg. Velocity steady.

FLOW
30 reward payments, 48125 PFT distributed to 14 contributors. Top earner: r4RPpe...WghS (14205 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC).

MOVERS
No activity data. 2 new wallet(s) this week. 121 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.2%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: partial. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-06-23): 94 transactions from 9 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
